title: Discovery UI: Credential and Revocation Management (issue wizard, revoke, status lists, key rotation)
description: Implement the Credentials and Revocations management pages. The Credentials page lists all issued credentials with type, issuer, subject_did, aud, env, expiry, and status. An Issue Wizard guides the admin through selecting consumer sentinel, producer service, scopes, and expiry. The Revoke action enforces two-step confirmation in prod. The Status Lists page shows published BitString Status Lists with statistics (no raw bitstring). Rotation endpoints trigger re-issuance with grace period.
objectives: Credentials page: table with credential_id (truncated), type, issuer_did_hash, subject_did_hash, aud, env, exp, status
Issue Wizard: 4-step form (select consumer sentinel, select producer service, select scopes, set expiry, confirm)
Revoke action with two-step confirmation in prod (reason + severity required)
Status Lists page: list statusListId, updatedAt, anchorHash (truncated), revoked_count statistics
Key rotation trigger: re-issue credentials for a sentinel after key rotation with grace window display
Links to relevant audit events on each credential/status list

steps.title: Credentials page implementation
steps.detail: File `src/pages/CredentialsPage.tsx`. API call: `GET /api/v1/credentials?env=&status=&type=&subject_did=&page=`. Columns: credential_id (first 12 chars + tooltip), type (chip), subject_did_hash (8 chars + tooltip with full hash), aud (truncated), env, exp (relative time + absolute tooltip), status chip. Filter controls: env, status (active/deprecated/expired/revoked), type. For each row: actions column with 'Revoke' button (disabled if already revoked/expired) and 'View Details' button. Details expand panel: shows issuer_did_hash, jti, statusListId+index, raw_jwt_hash (SHA-256 of JWT, NOT the JWT itself). Never display the raw VC JWT.

steps.title: Issue Wizard (4-step stepper)
steps.detail: Component `IssueCredentialWizard` in `src/components/credentials/`. Use MUI Stepper. Step 1 — Select Consumer: searchable dropdown of active sentinels filtered by role=consumer. Shows sentinel DID hash and service_id. Step 2 — Select Producer Service: searchable dropdown of active services. Auto-filters to env matching consumer. Step 3 — Configure: multi-select chips for `scopes` (load from service descriptor or predefined list), `expiry_days` number input (default 90, max 365), `credential_type` select (identity/service_binding/access_grant). Step 4 — Confirm: summary table of all selections + warning banner for prod environment. Submit: `POST /api/v1/credentials` — on success, show 'Credential issued. ID: {id}' snackbar and close wizard.

steps.title: Revoke action with two-step confirmation
steps.detail: Component `RevokeCredentialDialog` in `src/components/credentials/`. Props: `credentialId, env, type`. For non-prod: single dialog with `reason` text field (required, min 10 chars) + submit. For prod (`env === 'prod'`): two-step flow. Step 1: reason + severity dropdown (low/medium/high/critical). Step 2 (only if severity >= high): secondary confirmation — display `'Confirm revocation by typing the credential ID prefix: {credentialId[:12]}'`, text input must match exactly (constant-time compare on submit). This prevents accidental revocation of prod credentials. API call: `POST /api/v1/credentials/{id}/revoke` with body `{reason, severity}`. Show confirmation snackbar with: 'Credential revoked. Status list will update within 60 seconds.'

steps.title: Status Lists page
steps.detail: File `src/pages/RevocationsPage.tsx`. Two tabs: 'Credentials' (revoked credential list) and 'Status Lists' (StatusList credential view). Status Lists tab: API call `GET /api/v1/status-lists?page=`. Columns: status_list_id, issued_for_env, total_entries (# credentials), revoked_count, active_count, last_published_at (relative), anchor_hash (first 12 chars). No bitstring displayed. Click row: open drawer showing: sequential index allocation stats, credential entries (id hash + revoked boolean, no full VC). Link to relevant chain event (anchor tx_hash). Refresh button triggers manual re-fetch (rate-limited once/min by UI).

steps.title: Credential rotation support
steps.detail: When a sentinel rotates its DID key (TASK-039), its existing credentials become invalid (issued to old DID). The Discovery admin must re-issue. Trigger from UI in SentinelDetailDrawer (TASK-058): 'Re-issue Credentials' button appears when sentinel has `rotation_pending=true` flag. Opens dialog showing: old DID (hash), new DID (hash), grace period remaining, credentials affected count. On confirm: `POST /api/v1/sentinels/{id}/reissue-credentials`. Shows progress: 'Issuing N credentials...' with a spinner and counter. On complete: 'N credentials issued for new DID. Old credentials valid until {deprecated_until}'.

steps.title: Tests
steps.detail: Test files: `src/pages/__tests__/CredentialsPage.test.tsx` and `RevocationsPage.test.tsx`. Cases: (1) Credentials table renders with status chips; (2) Issue wizard progresses through 4 steps; (3) Step 3 scope selection displays available scopes; (4) Prod revoke requires two-step confirmation; (5) Non-prod revoke requires only reason field; (6) Credential ID confirmation field must match exactly for high-severity revoke; (7) Status lists page renders summary statistics; (8) Never renders raw VC JWT in any view.

files.discovery-ui/src/pages/RevocationsPage.t: Status lists and revoked credentials view
files.discovery-ui/src/api/credentials.ts: Typed API client for credential operations

security_constraints: Raw VC JWT must never be rendered in the UI — display only hashes and summary metadata
Two-step revocation confirmation for prod prevents accidental mass revocation
Credential ID confirmation input prevents scripted bulk revocation attacks
subject_did shown only as truncated hash (8 chars) in tables — full DID available on API but not displayed by default
Issue Wizard must validate scope selection against service descriptor — prevent issuing non-existent scopes
acceptance_criteria: Issue Wizard completes 4 steps and submits correctly to API
Revoke dialog requires two-step for prod high-severity revocation
Status list page shows statistics (revoked_count, total) without bitstring
Raw VC JWT never appears in any rendered HTML in any test
